basic_details.organization_name: Govind Ballabh Pant Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education & Research
basic_details.short_information: The Govind Ballabh Pant Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education & Research (GIPMER) has officially announced the Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 with 2 vacancies. The detailed notification was published on 17 July 2026 at the official website. Candidates with an upper age limit of 45 years (relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC) and possessing an MBBS with a PG Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty from a recognized University/Institution, along with registration with the Delhi Medical Council, are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their applications

content_sections.heading: GIPMER Senior Resident Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the GIPMER Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: GIPMER Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
GIPMER Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for GIPMER Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: GIPMER Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GIPMER Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the GIPMER Senior Resident posts is 21st July 2026. Candidates are advised to ensure their applications are submitted by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the walk-in interview date for the Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Resident positions at GIPMER is scheduled for 24th July 2026. Candidates should be present at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The required qualification is MBBS with a P.G Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty from a Recognized University/Institution, along with registration with the Delhi Medical Council.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST (05 years) and OBC (03 years) candidates.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Senior Resident post on an adhoc basis.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs 67,700/- plus usual allowances as admissible under the rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for the GIPMER Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 300/- (Non Refundable) for all categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Resident posts will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Govind Ballabh Pant Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education & Research (GIPMER) office. The exact address is New Delhi, 110002.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and Delhi Medical Council registration.
